GC & JFR Analysis

Copilot-driven Java profiling · Microsoft GCToolkit + JFR

Copilot detects the build tool and JDK, runs the workload with GC logging + JFR, then ingests the results here. It may ask what to run if the project is ambiguous.

No analysis yet.

Click Run analysis to have Copilot build and run this project's workload with GC logging and JFR enabled, then visualize the results here. You can also point Copilot at an existing gc.log/.jfr by asking it to call the gc_jfr_ingest tool.
